claimText: The Renewable Consumption Obligation (RCO) is established under the Energy Conservation Act (ECA) 2001.
evidenceExcerpt: Ministry of Power issued a revised draft notification on RCO under Energy Conservation Act (ECA) 2001
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question matching energy obligations to their parent Acts.
distractorHooks: Stating RCO is established under the Electricity Act, 2003
Stating RCO is established under the Environment Protection Act

claimText: The Renewable Purchase Obligation (RPO) is established under the Electricity Act, 2003.
evidenceExcerpt: RPO, established under Electricity Act, 2003, mandates electricity distribution companies, captive power producers and open-access consumers to annually purchase a certain minimum amount of RE.
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question matching energy obligations to their parent Acts.
distractorHooks: Stating RPO is established under the Energy Conservation Act, 2001

claimText: The Renewable Purchase Obligation (RPO) focuses on the actual purchase of renewable energy, whereas the Renewable Consumption Obligation (RCO) focuses on the actual consumption from renewable energy sources.
evidenceExcerpt: While RPO focuses on actual purchase, RCO focuses on actual consumption from RE sources.
examUse: Comparison question distinguishing the core mandates of RPO and RCO.
distractorHooks: Swapping the definitions of RPO and RCO
Claiming both RPO and RCO focus solely on installed generation capacity

claimText: Penalties for non-compliance with the Renewable Consumption Obligation (RCO) are overseen by the Bureau of Energy Efficiency (BEE).
evidenceExcerpt: Creates binding obligations with penalties for non-compliance overseen by Bureau of Energy Efficiency (BEE).
examUse: Institution-feature question identifying the regulatory body responsible for enforcing RCO penalties.
distractorHooks: Claiming penalties are overseen by the Central Electricity Regulatory Commission (CERC)
Claiming penalties are overseen by the Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE)
